sections.p: 1.1. This Privacy Policy (hereinafter — the «Policy») defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of individuals (hereinafter — «Users») using the «BeRanked» web service located at https://beranked.domcraft.digital/.
1.2. The operator of personal data is the self-employed Vladislav Kharin (citizen of Kazakhstan, operating in the Russian Federation on the basis of a residence permit, ITN 563811937786).
1.3. The purpose of this Policy is to ensure proper protection of User information from unauthorized access and disclosure.
The Operator may process the following data:
list: Email address — provided voluntarily for account creation and support.
Telegram ID — processed in case of using the notification bot.
Technical data — IP address, cookies, browser type, and access time.
sections.important: Important note: The Operator never collects or stores credit card data. All payments are processed via Robokassa or Lava.top secure gateways.

list: User identification and providing access to the Dashboard.
Communication with the User and support requests.
Activity analysis to improve Service quality.

sections.highlight: Personal data is stored exclusively on electronic media on servers located within the Russian Federation.
sections.p: Data is processed until account deletion or a written request from the User.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: You can cancel your paid subscription or credit package at any time.

sections.p: The User has the right to cancel services until the actual provision of access (crediting limits to the balance). Since BeRanked provides access to digital content instantly, refunds for already used limits are not provided.

refund.stepsDesc: If you made an accidental payment or encountered a technical issue, please follow these steps:

steps.text: Send a request to dom.craft.digital@gmail.com. Include your account email and payment date.
Your request will be processed by the administration within 24 hours.
After confirmation, the funds will be sent back to the same card used for the payment.

footer.timeline: Refund Timeframe: Funds are returned within 5-10 business days (depending on your bank).
footer.warning: Note: Refunds are issued in the full amount of the paid sum. We do not withhold any payment system or bank commissions.

offer.title: Public Offer
offer.warning: Please read this agreement carefully. Registration on the Site or payment for services constitutes your full and unconditional acceptance of all terms of this offer.

sections.p: 1.1. The Contractor provides access to the BeRanked SaaS service for analyzing public Behance data.
sections.italic: Consumer properties of the service: The User gains access to tools for automated monitoring of project (case) positions in Behance search results by specified tags, visualization of position history on charts, and the ability to manage check limits in the personal account.
list: Slot — a technical space for monitoring one project.
Limits — units deducted for checking a single tag.

sections.p: 2.1. The Contractor grants a license to use the Service, and the User pays for access in accordance with the selected Tariff.
sections.p2: 2.2. The service is ordered by the User independently through registration in the Personal Account and payment via integrated payment systems.

sections.p: 3.1. The cost of Services (Tariffs) is indicated on the Site in the 'Plans' section.
sections.p2: 3.2. Payment is made by non-cash transfer through the Robokassa service. Payment methods: bank cards (MIR, Visa, Mastercard), SBP.
sections.p3: 3.3. The service is considered fully provided upon the actual crediting of limits or activation of the tariff in the User's account.

sections.p: The User has the right to cancel services at any time. Procedure:
steps: Submit a request: Send a free-form request to dom.craft.digital@gmail.com. State your login and payment date.
Processing time: The Contractor reviews the request within 24 hours.
Execution: After confirmation, funds are returned to the same card used for payment.
Crediting time: Funds arrive within 5-10 business days.
sections.note: * Note: Refunds are issued in full without withholding payment system commissions.

sections.p: 5.1. BeRanked is not affiliated with Adobe Inc. or Behance. The Contractor is not responsible for the actions of third-party platforms.

step1.p: Copy your Behance case link and paste it into the field.

step2.p: We'll pull original tags, but you can add custom ones to find new niches.

step3.p: The bot checks rankings daily. You'll see real dynamics on charts.

items.a: Click 'New Project' in the sidebar. Paste your direct Behance link. Enter tags below. After clicking 'Launch', the robot will analyze your case.

items.q: What do the sidebar statuses mean?
items.a: 'In Queue' — waiting for parsing. 'Analyzing...' — scanning search results. 'Active' — data is ready.
The axis is inverted: the higher the dot, the better your rank (#1 is top). Upward line means your project is growing.
Hover over any point to see the smart Tooltip with exact rankings for that date.
Each tag has a switch to show/hide it on the chart. Useful for comparing specific keywords.

items.q: How to add new tags to existing projects?
items.a: Use the input above the matrix. Type a tag and click 'Add'. The robot will immediately check its position.
When ON, the system auto-updates rankings based on your plan. When OFF, updates only happen when you click 'Update Now'.
1 credit = 1 tag check. Credits reset monthly based on your plan. Extra Fuel packs stay until fully used.
